mapper.select:
WITH B AS ( SELECT BROKER_CODE, BRANCH_NAME FROM MEDIATE_BRANCH F WHERE BROKER_BRANCH_KIND = '00' )
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-01#Sql001 */ USER_ID, USER_NM USER_NAME, PASSWORD, LASTPWUPTIME PASSWORD_UPDATE_TIME, PRIV_ID, BRANCH_ID SBI_SECURITY_CODE, BROKER_ID BROKER_CODE, SUB_BROKER_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_NAME, GOVERNOR_FLAG, LOGIN_STATUS, PARTNER_USER_ID LOGIN_ID, PARTNER_USER_PW LOGIN_PASSWORD, CCS_USER_ID CCS_ID, CCS_USER_PW CCS_PASSWORD, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPTIMESTAMP_USER UPDATE_USER, UPTIMESTAMP_TIME UPDATE_TIME, BRANCH_NAME HEAD_OFFICE_BRANCH_NAME, BROKER_NAME, MAIL_ADDRESS, MANAGER_COUNT FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, A.PASSWORD, A.LASTPWUPTIME, A.PRIV_ID, A.BRANCH_ID, A.BROKER_ID, A.SUB_BROKER_ID, A.EMPLOYEE_ID, A.EMPLOYEE_NAME, A.GOVERNOR_FLAG, A.LOGIN_STATUS, A.PARTNER_USER_ID, A.PARTNER_USER_PW, A.CCS_USER_ID, A.CCS_USER_PW, A.CREATE_USER, A.CREATE_TIME, A.UPTIMESTAMP_USER, A.UPTIMESTAMP_TIME, A.MAIL_ADDRESS, B.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_NAME, C.BRANCH_NAME, 1 MANAGER_COUNT FROM TB_MED_USERS A LEFT OUTER JOIN B ON A.BROKER_ID = B.BROKER_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN BRANCH C ON C.BRANCH_CODE = A.BRANCH_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{req.userId}, '%'))
AND ( A.EMPLOYEE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{req.employeeNameChargeName}, '%')) OR A.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{req.employeeNameChargeName}, '%')) )
UNION SELECT AA.USER_ID, AA.USER_NM, AA.PASSWORD, AA.LASTPWUPTIME, AA.PRIV_ID, E.BRANCH_ID, E.BROKER_ID, E.SUB_BROKER_ID, E.EMPLOYEE_ID, E.EMPLOYEE_NAME, AA.GOVERNOR_FLAG, AA.LOGIN_STATUS, AA.PARTNER_USER_ID, AA.PARTNER_USER_PW, AA.CCS_USER_ID, AA.CCS_USER_PW, AA.CREATE_USER, AA.CREATE_TIME, AA.UPTIMESTAMP_USER, AA.UPTIMESTAMP_TIME, AA.MAIL_ADDRESS, BB.BRANCH_NAME AS BROKER_NAME, CC.BRANCH_NAME, 1 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY AA.USER_ID ORDER BY AA.USER_ID ASC ) MANAGER_COUNT FROM (select * from TB_MED_USERS where PRIV_ID IN ('3', '4', '5', '6', '7', '8', '9') ) AA INNER JOIN TB_MED_USERS_PRIV E ON AA.USER_ID = E.USER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN B BB ON E.BROKER_ID = BB.BROKER_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN BRANCH CC ON CC.BRANCH_CODE = E.BRANCH_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND AA.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{req.userId}, '%'))
AND ( AA.EMPLOYEE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{req.employeeNameChargeName}, '%')) OR AA.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{req.employeeNameChargeName}, '%')) )
) D
WHERE ( D.BRANCH_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{req.branchNameBrokerName}, '%')) OR D.BROKER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', CONCAT(#{req.branchNameBrokerName}, '%')) )
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-01#Sql002 */ COUNT(*) COUNT FROM TB_MED_USERS_PRIV A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{req.loginId} AND A.DELETE_FLG = '0'
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0601_01-01#Sql007 */ A.MENU_ID, A.MENU_NAME MENU_TITLE FROM TB_MED_MENU_NEW A WHERE A.IS_LEAF = '1' OR IS_POPPAGE = '1' ORDER BY MENU_ID
